name: Spaghetti and Tofu
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium-sized bowl, combine the mashed tofu, nutritional yeast, oil, and tamari.
2. Stir in the cooked spaghetti and tomato sauce until everything is well mixed.
3. Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and bake in a moderate oven (350°F/175°C) for about 20-25 minutes, or until heated through.
4. Serve hot.
